ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #12, Report
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello, via ZOOM, for Debra Dolch, via ZOOM, Trustee.

The court begins by asking Ms. Robello if she has seen the notes from the Examiner assigned to this matter. Ms. Robello confirms and offers oral testimony in support of the fees being requested by both the Trustee and attorney. Ms. Robello specifies that the fees being requested for payment to the financial advisor should be separate from those fees allocated to the Trustee and attorney. Ms. Robello is advised that the fees being requested are likely to be reduced. Ms. Robello submits to the court's suggestion.

The accounting petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #11, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello for Debra Dolch.

The Court questions how $19,973.70 in fees is reasonable when the timesheets show $9,896.25 in fees. Ms. Robello stated that the Petitioner is requesting a 1% guideline fee, that this is a two year accounting of a unitrust, that this is the eleventh accounting and that she believes 1% was approved for most of the accountings. Ms. Robello also stated that there was a previous order that allowed for payment on account for $750.00 a month, that the Petitioner has made those payments and that she is asking the Court to allow the 1% based on Ms. Dolch's experience. In addition, that the 19 hours of time was for regular administration of the trust, that Ms. Dolch reviews bills, makes payments, take care of the books, that she believes someone in Ms. Dolch's company is doing the accounting and it is being charged at the fiduciary rate of $145.00 an hour, that it is part of the hours she is requesting and that Ms. Dolch is not asking for double fees. The Court noted that the $750.00 per month may have to be reduced. The Eleventh Report and Account of Successor Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
